title: Exercise
description: An atomic training element. Carries all metadata needed for filtering (equipment, injury), prerequisite checking (requires/unlocks), and progression chaining.

category.description: Which exercise library file this lives in.

modality.description: Which modalities this exercise develops. An exercise can develop more than one.

equipment.description: Equipment required. All items must be present for this exercise to be available.

effort.description: Typical effort level when performed as written. Used for session load management. low = recovery work; max = 1RM attempts, max-effort sprints.

bilateral.description: True if the exercise loads both sides symmetrically. False for unilateral exercises (single-leg, single-arm). Used for injury substitution logic.

movement_patterns.description: Movement patterns this exercise belongs to. Used for injury exclusion matching and archetype slot filtering.

requires.description: Prerequisite IDs that must be mastered before this exercise can be programmed. Can reference other exercise IDs or abstract skill IDs (e.g. 'hip_hinge_pattern', 'bracing_mechanics').

unlocks.description: Exercise IDs that become available once this exercise is mastered. Defines the edges of the prerequisite graph.

contraindicated_with.description: Injury flag IDs. If any of these flags are active in the constraint layer, this exercise is excluded from selection.

progressions.description: How this exercise advances over time. At least one progression axis should be defined.

complexity.description: Exercise ID to progress to when this movement is mastered. e.g. 'kb_swing_single_arm'

scaling_down.description: Exercise IDs to substitute when this exercise is too demanding or prerequisites are not met.

typical_volume.description: Typical set/rep or time parameters when this exercise appears in a session. Used as default if archetype slot doesn't specify.
